Test Case Title: Verify GET All Carts Returns Valid Cart List
Description: Validate GET /carts returns a non-empty array matching cart list schema
Steps: 1. Send GET request to /carts 2. Verify response status code 3. Verify response body is a non-empty array 4. Verify each cart matches cart list schema
Expected: Response status is 200 and body is a valid non-empty cart array
Actual: Response status 200 with valid non-empty cart array returned

Test Case Title: Verify GET Cart By Id Returns Valid Cart Schema
Description: Validate GET /carts/:id returns a single cart matching cart schema
Steps: 1. Send GET request to /carts/1 2. Verify response status code 3. Verify response body matches cart schema 4. Verify cart id equals requested id
Expected: Response status is 200 and body is a valid cart with matching id
Actual: Response status 200 with valid cart object and id 1 returned

Test Case Title: Verify Cart Products Array Contains ProductId And Quantity
Description: Validate cart products array includes required product fields
Steps: 1. Send GET request to /carts/1 2. Verify products array is not empty 3. Verify each product has productId 4. Verify each product has quantity
Expected: Each product in cart contains productId and quantity fields
Actual: All products contain productId and quantity fields

Test Case Title: Verify GET Non-Existent Cart Id Returns Null Or Error
Description: Validate GET /carts/:id for invalid id handles missing resource
Steps: 1. Send GET request to /carts/99999 2. Verify response indicates cart not found
Expected: Response is null body or returns 404 error
Actual: Null response or 404 error returned for non-existent cart id

Test Case Title: Verify POST Creates Cart And Returns New Id
Description: Validate POST /carts creates a cart and returns a new numeric id
Steps: 1. Build cart payload with productId and quantity 2. Send POST request to /carts 3. Verify response status code 4. Verify response contains new numeric id 5. Verify response matches cart schema
Expected: Response status is success and body contains a new valid cart id
Actual: Cart created with new numeric id and valid cart schema

Test Case Title: Verify PUT Fully Replaces Cart And Returns Updated Id
Description: Validate PUT /carts/:id replaces entire cart resource
Steps: 1. Build full cart replacement payload 2. Send PUT request to /carts/1 3. Verify response status code 4. Verify response id matches requested cart id
Expected: Response status is success and cart id in response is 1
Actual: Cart fully replaced and response id is 1

Test Case Title: Verify PATCH Partially Updates Cart
Description: Validate PATCH /carts/:id updates only specified cart fields
Steps: 1. Build partial cart update payload 2. Send PATCH request to /carts/1 3. Verify response status code 4. Verify response contains cart id
Expected: Response status is success and updated cart id is returned
Actual: Cart partially updated and valid cart id returned

Test Case Title: Verify DELETE Returns Deleted Cart Object
Description: Validate DELETE /carts/:id removes cart and returns deleted object
Steps: 1. Send DELETE request to /carts/6 2. Verify response status code 3. Verify response body contains deleted cart id
Expected: Response status is success and deleted cart id is 6
Actual: Deleted cart object returned with id 6

Expected: Response status is success and cart id is returned despite empty products
Actual: Cart id returned for empty products array

Test Case Title: Verify Unauthenticated Client Can Read Any Cart By Id
Description: Validate IDOR — any cart id is readable without authentication

Expected: Access denied or scoped to authorized user only
Actual: Unauthenticated client can read carts 1 and 2 successfully

Test Case Title: Verify Authenticated Client Can Read Carts Belonging To Other Users

Expected: Access denied when cart does not belong to authenticated user
Actual: Authenticated client can read foreign cart id 3

Test Case Title: Verify Unauthenticated Client Can Mutate Another Users Cart

Expected: Access denied for cross-user cart mutation
Actual: Unauthenticated PATCH to /carts/2 returns 200 with updated products in response

Test Case Title: Verify Unauthenticated POST Carts Creates Cart
